name: Ring of Spell Storing
description: This ring stores up to 5 levels of spells imbued into it. Any caster can store spells; any wearer can activate them. The ring can hold up to three spells totalling no more than 5 spell levels (e.g., three 1st-level spells, or one 3rd and one 2nd).

name: Ring of Evasion
description: This ring grants the wearer the evasion ability. If the wearer already has evasion, she instead gains improved evasion.

name: Ring of Regeneration
description: This ring grants the wearer regeneration 1 (heals 1 hp/round; fire and acid deal normal damage). Lost limbs regrow in 1d6×10 minutes.

name: Robe of the Archmagi
description: This flowing robe (white for good, gray for neutral, black for evil) grants: +5 armor bonus to AC, spell resistance 18, +4 to saving throws against spells and spell-like abilities.

name: Robe of Eyes
description: This robe is covered in magical eyes granting 360-degree vision. The wearer gains all-around vision, Spot +10, darkvision 120 ft., and can see invisible and ethereal creatures. Cannot be flanked. Blinded in magical darkness.

name: Scarab of Protection
description: This golden scarab protects its wearer from harmful magic. It provides spell resistance 20. When a death effect is cast on the wearer, the scarab absorbs it (it can absorb 12 charges; when depleted, it crumbles to dust).

name: Scarab of Golembane
description: This scarab amulet grants the wearer the ability to detect golems and constructs within 60 feet (DC 15 Spot to notice). The wearer's weapons bypass the damage reduction of golems and constructs while the scarab is worn.

name: Vestments of Faith
description: These sacred vestments grant a cleric or favoured soul +5 bonus on Diplomacy, +2 enhancement bonus to Wisdom, and increase effective cleric level by 1 for the purposes of turning/rebuking undead.

name: Vestments of the Avatar
description: These divine vestments mark the wearer as the chosen champion of a god. Grants +5 sacred bonus to AC and saves, darkvision 60 ft., a +4 sacred bonus to Strength and Constitution, and use of divine power 1/day.
